title: Air Quality Health Index - Canada.ca
content:
## Air Quality Health Index

## Air Quality Health Index
Local conditions, forecasts, wildfire smoke, health risks, pollutants, weather, educational tool kits and publications.
Wildfire updates: Get the latest information
- Local AQHI conditions
- Wildfire smoke, air quality and your health

## Services and information

### Local Air Quality Health Index conditions
Current conditions, forecasts, air monitoring station locations.
Air pollution, respiratory illnesses, cardiovascular conditions,
          elderly, children.

### About the Air Quality Health Index
Public information tool, calculations, scale measurements, weather.
Actions, transportation, commuting, heating appliances, home energy,
          tips.

### Air quality and weather
Air quality model, weather variables, forecast products, science,
          weather conditions, deterioration.
Air quality, weather animations, thermal inversions, topography,
          long-range transport.
Indi the caterpillar animation video, index scale, colour days, risk
          categories.

### Protect yourself from the effects of air pollution
Learn how to set custom air quality health index notifications on the WeatherCAN app for your unique risk level in a few easy steps.
- Environment and Climate Change Canada
